name: caliper-workspace
description: Hyperledger Caliper Benchmark — BCMS Native BLAKE3 Certificate System (fabric-blake3-new)

notes.blake3: DO NOT add blake3-js as a dependency. Native BLAKE3 runs inside the Go chaincode via lukechampine.com/blake3. The npm overrides above redirect any transitive blake3-wasm references to the parent blake3 package. Caliper workloads use only Node.js crypto (SHA-256) on the client side.
